name: Kinea Rendimentos Imobiliarios Fundo de Investimento Imobiliario - FII
summary: Kinea Rendimentos Imobiliarios Fundo de Investimento Imobiliario (FII) is a real estate investment fund focused on generating income through investments in various real estate assets in Brazil, primarily through the acquisition of quotas in other FIIs and other real estate related investments. The fund aims to distribute regular income to its investors from the rental and sales of these properties or investments. Its headquarter is located in Brazil.
